name: @avenos/vibe-app-sandbox
description: Reusable host glue + outer-iframe sandbox proxy for running untrusted (vibe-coded / model-generated) UI artifacts via the MCP Apps protocol.

scripts.build: bun run build:proxy && bun run build:ext-apps
scripts.build:ext-apps: bun build sandbox/ext-apps-entry.ts --outfile sandbox/dist/ext-apps.js --target browser --format esm --minify
scripts.dev: bun run build && bun run serve
